title: Unacademy is Hiring: Subject Matter Expert (Senior)

jsonLd.title: Unacademy is Hiring: Subject Matter Expert (Senior)
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Subject Matter Expert looking for your next big career move? Unacademy in Kanpur offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Unacademy:
Unacademy is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with academic counselors for student career guidance
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in CBSE/ICSE Standards
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning
• Proficiency in Classroom Management
• Proficiency in Research Skills
• Proficiency in E-learning
• Proficiency in Child Psychology
• Proficiency in Zoom/Teams

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Kanpur, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Unacademy!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
